series_metadata.series_description: This series contains all digital evidence associated with a digital forensic analysis of data seized and analyzed as part of an investigation, including but not limited to: cell phone extraction data, analysis of digital evidence, computer extraction data, video analysis, audio analysis, digital search warrant returns, vehicle extraction data, etc

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 2 years from the date the case was closed. Evidence may be retained longer to comply with any court orders. ; Electronic: 2 years from the date the case was closed. Evidence may be retained longer to comply with any court orders., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
